title: Smoky Syrian Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from the Middle East, made with smoky spices and served with a side of peas.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add peas and sauté until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add rice to the skillet and stir to combine with peas.
Add smoky paprika and syrian sumac (if using), and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until rice is cooked and fluffy.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
